a:r.a:t: Q16: My assigned rotation gives me a fair opportunity to perform well.

Note: Average scores reflect the weighted mean of responses on a 5-point Likert scale (5 = Strongly Agree to 1 = Strongly Disagree), based on the distribution of all responses within each grouping. Neutral responses are included in the scoring as “3” but are excluded from the chart.
Perception of rotation opportunity is generally positive, but declines slightly with tenure for Telemarketing and Marketing
Variability across functions suggests inconsistent experience, with no single group demonstrating uniformly strong confidence
